title: marsdenia ovalifolia
intro: Marsdenia ovalifolia, also known as the oval-leafed moonflower or Marsdenia, is a perennial climber in the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, the plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Marsdenia ovalifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of insomnia and anxiety, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to leverage its medicinal benefits.
